name: Impossible Tuna and Cheddar Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a pie plate, 10-inch diameter.
3. Cook onions and butter in the skillet over low heat until onions are lightly browned.
4. Sprinkle tuna, 1 cup of cheese, and onions evenly on top of the crust.
5. Beat eggs, milk, Bisquick, salt, and pepper together for about 15 seconds using a blender at high speed, or mix with a hand beater for 1 minute until smooth.
6. Pour the mixture over the toppings in the pie plate.
7. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Top with tomato slices and remaining cheese; bake for an additional 3 to 5 minutes until melted.
9. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before serving.
